// Sistema de roles y permisos para el ERP Multi-Compañía
export const ROLES={SUPER_ADMIN:'super_admin',// Tú - Control total de todo
COMPANY_ADMIN:'company_admin',// Admin de compañía - Control total de su compañía
MANAGER:'manager',// Gerente - Gestión de producción y procesos
OPERATOR:'operator',// Operador - Solo producción
QUALITY:'quality'// Calidad - Solo control de calidad
};export const PERMISSIONS={// Permisos de Super Admin
SUPER_ADMIN:['view_all_companies','create_companies','edit_companies','delete_companies','create_users','edit_users','delete_users','assign_roles','view_all_data','system_settings'],// Permisos de Company Admin
COMPANY_ADMIN:['view_own_company','edit_own_company','create_users_in_company','edit_users_in_company','delete_users_in_company','assign_roles_in_company','view_all_company_data','manage_products','manage_customers','manage_processes','manage_production','manage_quality','manage_laboratory','manage_inventory','company_settings'],// Permisos de Manager
MANAGER:['view_own_company','manage_products','manage_customers','manage_processes','manage_production','view_quality_data','view_laboratory_data','view_inventory_data'],// Permisos de Operator
OPERATOR:['view_own_company','view_production_orders','create_production_orders','edit_production_orders','view_inventory_data','update_inventory'],// Permisos de Quality
QUALITY:['view_own_company','view_quality_controls','create_quality_controls','edit_quality_controls','view_laboratory_data','create_laboratory_analysis','edit_laboratory_analysis']};export const ROLE_HIERARCHY={[ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN]:5,[ROLES.COMPANY_ADMIN]:4,[ROLES.MANAGER]:3,[ROLES.OPERATOR]:2,[ROLES.QUALITY]:2};export const ROLE_DISPLAY_NAMES={[ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN]:'Super Administrador',[ROLES.COMPANY_ADMIN]:'Administrador de Compañía',[ROLES.MANAGER]:'Gerente',[ROLES.OPERATOR]:'Operador',[ROLES.QUALITY]:'Control de Calidad'};// Clase para manejar permisos
export class PermissionManager{static hasRole(userRole,requiredRole){const userLevel=ROLE_HIERARCHY[userRole]||0;const requiredLevel=ROLE_HIERARCHY[requiredRole]||0;return userLevel>=requiredLevel;}static hasPermission(userRole,permission){const permissions=PERMISSIONS[userRole]||[];return permissions.includes(permission);}static canAccessResource(userRole,resource){const resourcePermissions={'dashboard':['view_own_company','view_all_data'],'companies':['view_all_companies','create_companies'],'users':['create_users','create_users_in_company'],'products':['manage_products'],'customers':['manage_customers'],'processes':['manage_processes'],'production':['manage_production','view_production_orders'],'quality':['manage_quality','view_quality_data'],'laboratory':['manage_laboratory','view_laboratory_data'],'inventory':['manage_inventory','view_inventory_data'],'settings':['system_settings','company_settings']};const requiredPermissions=resourcePermissions[resource]||[];const userPermissions=PERMISSIONS[userRole]||[];return requiredPermissions.some(permission=>userPermissions.includes(permission));}static getAccessibleResources(userRole){const allResources=['dashboard','companies','users','products','customers','processes','production','quality','laboratory','inventory','settings'];return allResources.filter(resource=>this.canAccessResource(userRole,resource));}static canManageUser(managerRole,targetUserRole){return this.hasRole(managerRole,targetUserRole);}}export default PermissionManager;
